allow: Bash(DB_NAME=distributor DB_USER=postgres SECRET_KEY=test ALLOWED_HOSTS=localhost python manage.py check --settings=config.settings.production)

PowerShell(try { Move-Item -Path .\\assets -Destination .\\ada-frontend\\assets -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "assets OK" } catch { "assets: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { Move-Item -Path .\\public -Destination .\\ada-frontend\\public -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "public OK" } catch { "public: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { Move-Item -Path .\\src -Destination .\\ada-frontend\\src -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "src OK" } catch { "src: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
PowerShell(try { Move-Item -Path .\\node_modules -Destination .\\ada-frontend\\node_modules -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "node_modules OK" } catch { "node_modules failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = 'utf-8'; python manage.py shell --settings=config.settings.development -c "from apps.catalog.models import Category; print\('before:', list\(Category.objects.values\('name','slug'\)\)\); Category.objects.filter\(slug=''\).delete\(\); print\('after:', list\(Category.objects.values\('name','slug'\)\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import bleach, django_summernote; print\('bleach', bleach.__version__\); print\('summernote', django_summernote.__version__\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import bleach; print\(bleach.__version__\); print\(bleach.__file__\); import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(bleach.clean\)\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = 'utf-8'; python manage.py shell --settings=config.settings.development -c "from apps.catalog.models import Brand, Category, Product; from apps.content.models import Banner, News, Promo; from apps.vacancies.models import Vacancy; from apps.contacts.models import ContactRequest; print\('Brand', Brand.objects.count\(\)\); print\('Category', Category.objects.count\(\)\); print\('Product', Product.objects.count\(\)\); print\('Banner', Banner.objects.count\(\)\); print\('News', News.objects.count\(\)\); print\('Promo', Promo.objects.count\(\)\); print\('Vacancy', Vacancy.objects.count\(\)\); print\('ContactRequest', ContactRequest.objects.count\(\)\)")

PowerShell($tries = 0; while \($tries -lt 20\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8765/admin/ -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; break } catch { if \($_.Exception.Response\) { $r = $_.Exception.Response; break } else { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $tries++ } } }; "status=$\($r.StatusCode\) location=$\($r.Headers.Location\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = 'utf-8'; python manage.py shell --settings=config.settings.development -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; U=get_user_model\(\); print\('superusers:', list\(U.objects.filter\(is_superuser=True\).values_list\('username', flat=True\)\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import sys, django; print\('Python', sys.version\); print\('Django', django.__version__\)")

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING = 'utf-8'; python manage.py shell --settings=config.settings.development -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; U=get_user_model\(\); n,_ = U.objects.filter\(username='_probe_admin'\).delete\(\); print\('deleted', n\)")
